- Linear relationships:
    - scatter plots and linear trends
    - correlation coefficient ($r$)
- Simple linear regression (SLR):
    - least squares estimation
    - coefficient of determination ($R^2$)
    - interpreting slopes and intercepts
- Multiple linear regression (MLR):
    - partial slopes and "holding all else equal"
    - omitted variable bias and confounding
- Inference for regression:
    - hypothesis tests and confidence intervals for slopes
    - reading and interpreting R regression output
